name: Joni Ernst
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,446,900 for Joni Ernst in U.S. Senate, IA. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
